title: SSID Convergence Registry Entry
description: Schema for convergence registry entries. Each entry records the result of a convergence run across one or more repositories.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for the convergence run (ISO 8601 UTC format, e.g. 20260309T120000Z).

scan_time_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the convergence scan was executed.

contract_sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the convergence contract used for this run.

repos_scanned.description: List of repository names scanned in this convergence run.

overall_status.description: Aggregated convergence status across all scanned repositories.

manifest_sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the combined convergence manifest produced by this run.

evidence_path.description: Path to the evidence artifacts for this convergence run (relative to SSID-EMS or absolute).
